heading: Service in multiparty, multiforum actions
label: 1697 Service in multiparty, multiforum actions
text: When the jurisdiction of the district court is based in whole or in part upon , process, other than subpoenas, may be served at any place within the United States, or anywhere outside the United States if otherwise permitted by law.section 1369 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to a civil action if the accident giving rise to the cause of action occurred on or after the 90th day after , see , set out as a note under .Nov. 2, 2002section 11020(c) of Pub. L. 107–273section 1369 of this title
